EUR has PI=50.62 (well above target 30.0) and CU=0.9994 (near 1.0). High inflation requires demand suppression. Contraction reduces factory productivity, curbing demand and easing inflationary pressure. One pull is sufficient to address overheating without excessive recessionary risk.
